variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 17393 Engine Breather Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAO 17393 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 17393 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 17393 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: ENGINE BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 98.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 37.5 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 37.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 225.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 210.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 204.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter LC 1002 x Ventilator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 17393
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter LC 1002 x Ventilator | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 17393
variants.description: For over 70 years, MANN-FILTER has been synonymous with premium filters in original equipment quality worldwide. Benefit from a comprehensive product range and optimum filtration performance to protect drivers, engines and machinery. In the familiar yellow-green packaging, MANN-FILTER offers innovative solutions to new filtration challenges and produces on a global scale in accordance with the latest international production and test standards in the automotive industry.
specifications: Style: Ventilator, Dimension A: 98.0 mm, Dimension D: 98.0 mm, Dimension H: 225.0 mm
